title: Hash Move
text: Home * Chess * Moves * Hash Move The Hash Move is a Move Ordering related issue. The Hash Move is a move probed from the transposition table , either a best move of a stored PV-node - a PV-move , or a good enough refutation move to cause a cutoff . This move should most importantly searched first [1] [2] . One may save the move generation at all, if the hash move actually fails high . To guard against rare TT key collisions , one may apply a legality test of the hash move [3] .
